summary: PASS: The change replaces the schema-0.2-incompatible synthetic ownership probe with selected-Story PR route resolution while retaining the existing execution-state owner, managed/source reconciliation transaction, flat-route compatibility, and rollback behavior. No CLI reverse dependency or new target-architecture violation is introduced; current-HEAD conformance remains exactly at the origin/main baseline, and both schema 0.2 and legacy path surfaces are covered by passing targeted evidence.
inspection_summary: risk_surfaces=core_workflow_state; reviewed exact HEAD e3c7d93bdc6fb9d04964bb3f2f5248b9b93e5c01 against origin/main 6222d118315e7001abcbdc786aca932e48c58232; inspected all 18 changed paths, selected-Story route ownership, managed/source transactional sync, schema 0.2 named profiles, legacy flat routes, rollback/failure behavior, dependency direction, targeted TAP (124 pass, 0 fail), focused route/sync evidence (5 pass, 0 fail), and conformance parity (85 total, 65 undeclared, 9 budget, 11 orphan on both heads)

judgment_delta.initial_risk: Removing the synthetic ownership probe could make directory-scoped and flat PR routes indistinguishable and broaden the copied lifecycle surface.
judgment_delta.inspection: The implementation classifies the parent of the selected route template as Story-scoped only when it contains {story_id} or {feature_slug}; otherwise the existing explicit flat-route lifecycle file set remains in force. Legacy configured-route and rollback coverage passed.
judgment_delta.judgment: Risk resolved; path behavior remains intentionally split between Story directories and flat compatibility routes.

judgment_delta.initial_risk: Schema 0.2 named profiles could still bypass catalog and Story-mirror selection or reintroduce a synthetic Story lookup.
judgment_delta.inspection: Both managed and source roots call resolveArtifactRoute for the actual state.story_id. The resolver validates the named profile, catalog entry, and matching Story mirror. The new unit and E2E fixtures provide complete schema 0.2 catalogs and mirrors, and the pre-fix synthetic ownership probe would fail those fixtures.
judgment_delta.judgment: Risk resolved; ownership is now derived from the selected Story's canonical route rather than an unregistered probe.

judgment_delta.initial_risk: The closure change could place run-session behavior in the CLI layer or add an inward-to-outward dependency.
judgment_delta.inspection: The production delta is confined to src/execution-state.js, which remains the existing workspace-infra reconciliation owner and imports artifact routing directly. No production import was added, execution-state does not import src/cli.js, and CLI continues to compose execution-state from the outside.
judgment_delta.judgment: No new reverse dependency or module-boundary violation was found.

judgment_delta.initial_risk: Changing route discovery could weaken source authority, partial-copy rollback, or commit-last semantics.
judgment_delta.inspection: The snapshot, copy, rollback, and authority-commit sequence is unchanged. Existing real-artifact sync, rollback, legacy route, and sync-failure tests passed alongside the new schema 0.2 cases.

judgment_delta.initial_risk: Documentation, task projection, or Story-local policy changes could conceal a broader runtime or architecture expansion.
judgment_delta.inspection: The Story, architecture, Spec, test plan, generated tasks, and config amendment describe the same selected-Story route correction. The budget amendment is Story-scoped, the remaining architecture task is proposal-only, and no unrelated production module changed.
judgment_delta.judgment: The changed-path union is coherent with the bounded delivery and does not widen runtime ownership.

judgment_delta.initial_risk: Existing target-architecture debt could be worsened by the execution-state edit.
judgment_delta.inspection: Fresh current-HEAD and origin/main conformance evidence both report 85 total violations: 65 undeclared dependencies, 9 file-budget violations, and 11 orphan modules. The source delta adds no import edge.
judgment_delta.judgment: Baseline debt is unchanged; the Story does not worsen target-architecture conformance.

inspected_inputs: node --test --test-reporter=tap --test-name-pattern='schema 0\.2|configured PR route|legacy.*route|artifact sync|post-merge authority sync' test/execution-state.test.js test/e2e/story-vibepro-one-command-pr-ready-closure-runtime.spec.ts (5 pass, 0 fail)
